findings.title: Overly permissive CORS with wildcard origin and credentials
findings.description: CORS headers set Access-Control-Allow-Origin to *, Allow-Credentials to true, and Allow-Headers to * on every response

findings.title: Server version and technology disclosure via response headers
findings.description: Every response includes Server and X-Powered-By headers revealing exact libmicrohttpd version and OS

findings.title: XML External Entity processing enabled in product import
findings.description: xmlReadMemory called with XML_PARSE_DTDLOAD and XML_PARSE_NOENT flags enabling XXE attacks

findings.title: Debug mode enabled with TLS verification disabled
findings.description: Global defaults set debug_mode=1, tls_verify=0, and log_level=DEBUG as compile-time configuration

findings.title: Diagnostics endpoint exposes database credentials and build information
findings.description: Admin diagnostics returns database host, username, password, and compile timestamps in JSON response
